title: Randomizer++
description: A Minecraft Randomizer to randomize Block Drops, Mob Drops, Chest Loot and Crafting
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39b1c40d79e5d4577baebb9ca56d657f5a880694.png)

Randomizer is a feature-rich plugin to randomize nearly every item, players can get

## Features
- Block Drop Randomization
- Mob Drop Randomization
- Chest Loot Randomization
- Crafting Result Randomization¹
- Crafting Ingreadients Randomization¹
- Per Team (Minecraft /team) Randomization Seed
- Ingame Player Atlas to lookup already dropped items (Permission based)
- Ingame Admin Atlas to lookup every item
- Every Randomizer Mode is toggleable 

## How to use
1. Download the jar and place it in the `plugins/` folder
2. Restart the Server
3. 
  - Enable Randomizer globally `/randomizer <block|mob|loot|craft|ingredients> <enable|disable|seed get / set / new>`
  or
  - Enable Randomizer for a team `/randomizer <teamName> <block|mob|loot|craft|ingredients> <enable|disable|seed get / set / new>`
  or
  - Bulk enable randomizer for all teams `/randomizer <block|mob|loot|craft|ingredients> <enable|disable> for <all|teamNames>`

### Atlas
- You can lookup already dropped items using `/altas fromwhat <item>`, this shows  the sources, for block & mob drops 
- You can lookup already broken / old drops that got replaced using `/atlas whatis <item>`, this will show what that item will drop.
- The Atlas has an Admin Mode `/atlas admin` to lookup every item

¹Crafting Randomization might lag the server for about 15s.

²Permissions for atlas are being added soon
